# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: thirdparty-api-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - "<external-service-name>.com"
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: thirdparty-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
    - "<external-service-name>.com"
  gateways:
    - istio-egressgateway
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: "<external-service-name>.com"
            port: 443

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - "<database-host>"
  ports:
    - number: "<database-port>"
      name: tcp
      protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-vs
spec:
  hosts:
    - "<database-host>"
  gateways:
    - istio-egressgateway
  tcp:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: "<database-host>"
            port: "<database-port>"
